scope: static architecture freeze only; no database, installed plugin, or Workflow was invoked

checks.name: two_distinct_tool_entries
checks.detail: one provider exposes two named Tool contracts

checks.name: legacy_identity
checks.detail: Legacy technical Tool name is frozen

checks.name: modern_identity
checks.detail: Modern technical Tool name is frozen

checks.name: legacy_nine_parameter_order
checks.detail: Legacy UI remains the original nine-field order

checks.name: legacy_five_database_values
checks.detail: Legacy declarations preserve five original database values

checks.name: modern_parameter_contract
checks.detail: Modern Tool remains credential-backed and separate

checks.name: mssql_to_sqlserver
checks.detail: Legacy mssql maps to the internal sqlserver adapter key

checks.name: oracle_controlled_unsupported
checks.detail: Oracle declarations are explicit controlled unsupported paths

checks.name: shared_execution_core
checks.detail: both paths call the same execution core after their own mapping

checks.name: output_contract_isolation
checks.detail: Legacy records and modern structured envelopes are independent

checks.name: legacy_properties_boundary
checks.detail: Legacy properties are parsed before only mapped fields enter internal config

checks.name: json_dsl_execution_persistence
checks.detail: passed JSON DSL persists json under tool_parameters

frozen_routes.legacy: legacy_database_query -> legacy mapper -> legacy SQL policy -> shared execution core -> legacy formatter
frozen_routes.modern: db_query_extended -> provider credential mapper -> modern read-only policy -> shared execution core -> modern structured formatter

phase10_4_required_changes: Preserve original Legacy SQL acceptance as exactly one SELECT statement; do not silently inherit broader modern policy.
Preserve the Legacy runtime exception path with sanitized text instead of returning a new structured Legacy error envelope.
Reject unsupported or duplicate db_properties explicitly; do not silently discard them. Only schema, charset, and ssl_mode map to internal config.
